AND CARLOS ROMERO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1, 2, AND 3 (WRONGFUL TERMINATION, "SEXUAL ABUSE" AND RACE) DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 4 AND 5, "THREATS AND HARASSMENT" AND "VIOLATION OF COMPANY POLICY", RESPECTIVELY. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTER: ERIC THRONE CSR# 7855
